---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior in the AI GRC Platform
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

A clear description of what actually happened.

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or paste relevant log output (remove any sensitive data).

```
Paste logs here
```

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| OS | e.g. Ubuntu 22.04 |
| Node.js version | e.g. 20.11.0 |
| PostgreSQL version | e.g. 15.2 |
| Browser (if UI bug) | e.g. Chrome 122 |
| Deploy method | e.g. Local / Docker / Self-hosted |

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., only happens with specific framework, only for certain user roles, etc.).

## Possible Fix

If you have an idea of what might be causing this or how to fix it, please describe it here.
